name: The Kurfürstendamm-to-Finish Classic

spots.name: Kurfürstendamm (km 7–9)
spots.exitGuidance: Use Kurfürstendamm exit, walk 2 min south to course barriers
spots.sideGuidance: South side of Ku'damm for runner approach from west

spots.name: Potsdamer Platz (km 25/39)
spots.exitGuidance: Use Leipziger Platz exit for east-side viewing. EXIT NOT FOUND for exact exit number — follow signs to Leipziger Platz.
spots.sideGuidance: East side (Leipziger Platz) to see runners at both km 25 and km 39

spots.name: Brandenburger Tor Finish (km 42)
spots.exitGuidance: Pariser Platz exit. Arrive 60+ min before expected finish time.
spots.sideGuidance: SIDE NOT FOUND — spectator positioning at finish depends on annual setup. South side of gate historically more accessible.

failureModes: Potsdamer Platz wrong-side trap if you exit on the west side
Finish area fills up — if you arrive <30 min before your runner, you may not get a view of the gate
backupPlan: If Potsdamer Platz is too crowded, skip it and go directly to finish area via U2 → Brandenburger Tor. Two views instead of three.

name: The Fast-Runner Sprint Route

spots.name: Start Area (km 0–1)
spots.exitGuidance: Walk south from Tiergarten S-Bahn to Straße des 17. Juni
spots.sideGuidance: North side of Straße des 17. Juni

spots.name: Halfway / Frankfurter Allee (km 20–22)
spots.exitGuidance: EXIT NOT FOUND — use main street-level exit and walk toward course

spots.name: Brandenburger Tor Finish (km 42)
spots.sideGuidance: South side of gate if available

failureModes: Sub-3:00 runner gives you very little transit time between spots
Frankfurter Allee → Brandenburger Tor requires 25+ min transit; if runner is sub-2:50, this is nearly impossible
backupPlan: Drop the halfway spot. Watch start + finish only. Use the gap to secure a prime finish viewing position.

name: The Kreuzberg Local

spots.name: Schöneberg / Hauptstraße (km 30–32)
spots.exitGuidance: Hauptstraße exit, walk 3 min to course
spots.sideGuidance: East side of Hauptstraße for runner approach from south

failureModes: Requires U7 reliability — usually fine but check for weekend maintenance
Schöneberg section can feel empty compared to marquee spots
backupPlan: If U7 is disrupted, walk from Hermannplatz to Schöneberg via Mehringdamm (U6/U7) — adds 10 min but avoids surface transit.

name: The Minimum-Walk Comfort Route

spots.name: Kurfürstendamm (km 7–9)
spots.exitGuidance: Main exit, walk 5 min west on Tauentzienstraße to Ku'damm course section

spots.name: Brandenburger Tor Finish (km 42)
spots.exitGuidance: Pariser Platz exit. With a 4:15+ runner you have 3+ hours to transit and position.

failureModes: Only two viewing spots, but near-guaranteed success
Long wait at finish but this is a feature not a bug — bring a book
backupPlan: No backup needed — this route has maximum margin for error.
